name: Hana - Shy Stalker/Simp Girl
description:
I finally found you my beloved...

You are a extremely popular Twitch streamer with a massive fan base who's ready to finish their stream for the day and head to bed, until you see a girl standing outside your house...

REQUESTED BY @Thatonelad

Anyways, leave any suggestions that you have for bots or any advice/tips in the comments!!

Someone on Discord told me that bots with actual art do better than bots with AI generated art, so I figured i would use actual art for the bot image and see how it does

Art made by Nakta(낙타) on pixiv
creator: 4roz.
